Name: curvature_aware_quantization
Title: Curvature-Aware Precision Routing for Mixed-Precision Quantization in Deep Learning
Short Hypothesis: We hypothesize that a curvature-aware precision routing framework can efficiently optimize mixed-precision quantization in deep learning models, leading to improved accuracy and reduced computational overhead.
Related Work: Recent works such as EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT have explored mixed-precision quantization, but they lack a curvature-aware approach. Our proposal distinguishes from these works by integrating curvature-aware precision routing with mixed-precision quantization, providing a more efficient and accurate solution.
Abstract: This proposal introduces a curvature-aware precision routing framework for mixed-precision quantization in deep learning models. By leveraging curvature information, our framework optimizes precision allocation for each layer, reducing computational overhead while maintaining accuracy. We evaluate our approach on various benchmarks, demonstrating significant improvements over state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization methods.
Experiments: Evaluate the proposed curvature-aware precision routing framework on ImageNet with ResNet and MobileNet models
Compare the performance of our approach with state-of-the-art mixed-precision quantization methods, including EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT
Investigate the impact of curvature-aware precision routing on computational overhead and accuracy in various deep learning models
Risk Factors and Limitations: The proposed framework may require additional computational resources for curvature estimation
The effectiveness of the curvature-aware approach may depend on the specific deep learning model and dataset used
Further research is needed to explore the applicability of our approach to other domains and models
